item.ptxt: Operation of the tire pressure warning reset switch can be checked in TEST MODE.
During TEST MODE, the system is not initialized by pushing the tire pressure warning reset switch. The circuit of the tire pressure warning reset switch can be inspected during this mode.

step2.ptxt: Make sure that the ignition switch is off.
Connect the intelligent tester to DLC3.
Check that the tire pressure warning light comes on for 3 seconds and then goes off.
Select the TEST MODE on intelligent tester.
Confirm that the tire pressure warning light in the combination meter blinks at 0.125 second intervals.

item.ptxt: When entering signal check mode, the tire pressure warning ECU sets all the signal check DTCs first.
After completing signal check for each inspection item, the DTCs for systems that are determined to be normal by the tire pressure warning ECU will be erased.
The DTCs for other inspection items may not be erased when only a certain signal is inspected.
When signal check returns to normal mode, all the signal check DTCs will be erased.

step2.ptxt: Make sure that the ignition switch is off.
Connect the intelligent tester to DLC3.
Select the SIGNAL CHECK on intelligent tester.

atten4.ptxt: Every time the test mode DTC erasure conditions are satisfied, the tire pressure warning light comes on for 1 second. Then, the tire pressure warning light blinks at 0.125 seconds intervals.

step2.ptxt: Drive the vehicle at 12 mph (20 km/h) or more for 10 seconds or more to check the vehicle speed signal (C2191/91).
Loosen the valve core and rapidly reduce the pressure (at least 40 kPa (0.41 kg/cm2, 5.8 psi) within 30 seconds or more) to check the transmitter data (C2181/81 to C2185/85).

atten4.ptxt: The transmitter ID can be transmitted by rapidly reducing the tire pressure.

step2.ptxt: Check that the tire pressure warning system test mode DTCs are erased.

entry.ptxt: Receive data from the transmitter which has a registered ID in the tire pressure warning ECU
Vehicle speed of 12 mph (20 km/h) or more is detected for 3 seconds or more

step2.ptxt: Check the tire pressure warning reset switch.

step3.ptxt: Press the tire pressure warning reset switch.
Check the tire pressure warning indicator light.

item.ptxt: Switch ON: TPWS indicator comes on
Switch OFF: TPWS indicator blinks

atten4.ptxt: After the signal check is completed, check for a signal check DTC to confirm the system status.

entry.ptxt: Repair the faulty part and enter SIGNAL CHECK again

content5.ptxt: After completing the test mode (SIGNAL CHECK), turn the ignition switch off and disconnect the tester.

spec.title: DTC of SIGNAL CHECK (TEST DIAGNOSIS) function

specitem.ptxt: If a trouble code is displayed during the test mode DTC check, check the circuit listed for that code. For details of each code, refer to the relevant page listed under respective "DTC No." in the chart.
